name: LG_SLLINE_UPD_323_02
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER LG_SLLINE_UPD_323_02  ON LG_323_02_SLTRANS
FOR UPDATE
AS
DECLARE @RAMOUNT  FLOAT
DECLARE @RLNAMOUNT  FLOAT
DECLARE @Epsilon  FLOAT
DECLARE @INSLREF  INT
DECLARE @SLREF   INT
DECLARE @ITMREF   INT
DECLARE @TMPSLREF  INT
DECLARE @TMPITMREF  INT
DECLARE @OK       FLOAT
DECLARE @SLTYP          INT
DECLARE @MAINAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @INSLAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_RAMOUNT    FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_RLNAMOUNT  FLOAT
DECLARE @IOCODE         INT
DECLARE @LOGICALREF     INT
DECLARE @OLD_MAINAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @OLD_INSLAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_MAINAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_INSLAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_INSLREF    INT
--------------------
DECLARE @OK2   INT
--------------------
DECLARE @FICHETYPE  INT
DECLARE @DATE_   DATETIME
DECLARE @STFICHEREF  INT
DECLARE @STTRANSREF  INT
DECLARE @TRCODE   INT
DECLARE @AMOUNT   FLOAT
DECLARE @ORGLOGICREF INT
DECLARE @OK1   INT
--------------------
SELECT
 @RAMOUNT        = I.REMAMOUNT,
    @RLNAMOUNT      = I.REMLNUNITAMNT,
    @INSLREF        = I.INSLTRANSREF,
    @SLREF          = I.SLREF,
    @ITMREF         = I.ITEMREF,
    @SLTYP          = I.SLTYPE,
 @IOCODE   = I.IOCODE,
 @LOGICALREF  = I.LOGICALREF,
 @STFICHEREF  = I.STFICHEREF,
 @STTRANSREF  = I.STTRANSREF,
 @TRCODE         = I.FICHETYPE,
 @AMOUNT         = I.AMOUNT,
 @DATE_   = I.DATE_,
 @OLD_MAINAMOUNT = I.MAINAMOUNT,
 @OLD_INSLAMOUNT = I.INSLAMOUNT,
 @NEW_INSLREF = I.INSLTRANSREF,
 @FICHETYPE  = I.FICHETYPE
FROM
 INSERTED I
--------------------
IF @IOCODE IN (1,2)
SELECT @NEW_INSLREF =  @LOGICALREF
--------------------
IF (@NEW_INSLREF > 0)
 UPDATE LG_323_02_SLTRANS SET ITEMREF=ITEMREF WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF
--------------------
SELECT @OK2=INDORDSLTRNREF FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55
--------------------
IF ISNULL(@OK2,0)=0
BEGIN
 SELECT
 @MAINAMOUNT = SUM(MAINAMOUNT),
 @INSLAMOUNT = SUM(INSLAMOUNT)
 FROM
 LG_323_02_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
 WHERE
 INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
 AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
 AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
  AND INPLNSLTRANSREF=0
  AND CANCELLED=0
  AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55)
  AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
END
--------------------
IF ISNULL(@OK2,0)<>0
BEGIN
 SELECT
 @MAINAMOUNT = SUM(MAINAMOUNT),
 @INSLAMOUNT = SUM(INSLAMOUNT)
 FROM
 LG_323_02_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
 WHERE
 INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
 AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
  --AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
    AND CANCELLED=0
    AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55)
    AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
    AND INDORDSLTRNREF NOT IN
(
 SELECT
 LOGICALREF
 FROM
 LG_323_02_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
 WHERE
 INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
 AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
 AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
  AND INPLNSLTRANSREF=0
  AND CANCELLED=0
  AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55)
  AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
)
END
--------------------
SELECT @Epsilon = 0.00000001
--------------------
SELECT @NEW_RAMOUNT = ROUND(REMAMOUNT,8), @NEW_RLNAMOUNT = ROUND(REMLNUNITAMNT,8) , @OLD_MAINAMOUNT=ROUND(MAINAMOUNT,8), @OLD_INSLAMOUNT=ROUND(AMOUNT,8)
FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF
--------------------
IF ((@OLD_MAINAMOUNT - @NEW_RAMOUNT) <> ISNULL(@MAINAMOUNT,0)) OR ((@OLD_INSLAMOUNT - @NEW_RLNAMOUNT) <> ISNULL(@INSLAMOUNT,0))
BEGIN
       UPDATE LG_323_02_SLTRANS SET REMAMOUNT=ROUND((MAINAMOUNT - ISNULL(@MAINAMOUNT,0)),8) , REMLNUNITAMNT=ROUND((AMOUNT - ISNULL(@INSLAMOUNT,0)),8) WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND @FICHETYPE<>55
END
--------------------
SELECT
 @RAMOUNT        = D.REMAMOUNT,
    @RLNAMOUNT      = D.REMLNUNITAMNT,
    @INSLREF        = D.INSLTRANSREF,
    @SLREF          = D.SLREF,
    @ITMREF         = D.ITEMREF,
 @SLTYP          = D.SLTYPE,
 @IOCODE   = D.IOCODE,
 @LOGICALREF  = D.LOGICALREF
FROM
 DELETED D
--------------------
SELECT @Epsilon = 0.00000001
--------------------
SELECT @OK = 0
  IF @INSLREF <> 0
        BEGIN
              SELECT @TMPSLREF = SLREF, @TMPITMREF = ITEMREF FROM LG_323_02_SLTRANS
              WHERE LOGICALREF = @INSLREF
              IF (@SLTYP = 3) OR
                 ((@TMPSLREF = @SLREF) AND (@TMPITMREF = @ITMREF))
                SELECT @OK = 0
              ELSE
                SELECT @OK = 1
        END
--------------------
IF (@RAMOUNT < (-1 * @Epsilon)) OR (@RLNAMOUNT < (-1 * @Epsilon)) OR (@OK = 1)
 RAISERROR('LBS_ERROR=10001', 11, 1)
